<a id="kind-clusterplacementgroup"></a>
## ClusterPlacementGroup

Manage OCI Cluster Placement Groups.

- `Plural`: `clusterplacementgroups`
- `Scope`: `Namespaced`
- `APIVersion`: `clusterplacementgroups.oracle.com/v1beta1`
- `Sample`: [Sample](../../../samples/clusterplacementgroups/v1beta1/clusterplacementgroup.md) (`config/samples/clusterplacementgroups_v1beta1_clusterplacementgroup.yaml`)
- `Packages`: Not currently exposed by a customer-visible package.
